title: 菊花賞の後に・青空は遠くとも

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky loses the Kikuka Sho, the final race of
the Classic Triple Crown. Still, the audience
cheers her incredible performance during the
race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky praises Special Week for her hard work
in the Classics. At the same time, the third
member of the big three, King Halo, watches in
frustration.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Seiun Sky is unsure of which race to do
next, on the way home she hears from a fan that
Grass Wonder will run in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Encouraged by her fans, Seiun Sky sets her sights
on the Arima Kinen so she can defeat Grass
Wonder and become the best in her generation.
